notes: Wave 12 Track A candidate, from country-hub-data.js gap scan.

Owner explicitly confirmed 2026-07-14 (AskUserQuestion) to proceed with Easter-cycle events (Easter Monday, Ascension, Whit Monday), framed strictly around legal/civil/historical status and never affirming the Resurrection as true, matching the existing live good-friday-germany/ascension-day-germany/assumption-day-france pattern.

Date rule (easter type, easterOffset 1) and history (1801 Concordat with Napoleon reduced a full Easter-week shutdown to a single day) confirmed via WebSearch against sortiraparis.com/Wikipedia/erasmusplace.com.
